before_semantics.lifecycle_status: Separate status badge existed, but held-side wording could be confused with lifecycle/result

after_semantics.held_side_label: Explicit TEAM TO WIN / TEAM TO LOSE text
after_semantics.price_label: Held price now / Held price (stale) / Held price unavailable
after_semantics.stale_unavailable_note: Explicit note that live P&L and live equity may lag or be incomplete when market price is stale/unavailable

formula_truth.unrealized_pnl: unchanged: YES => (current_price - entry_px) * qty ; NO => (entry_px - current_price) * qty

exact_labels_changed: WIN -> YES (contract badge now YES CONTRACT)
LOSE -> NO (contract badge now NO CONTRACT)
pos-team now reads explicit side text: TEAM TO WIN / TEAM TO LOSE
Available Cash -> Available Cash (not in positions)
Capital in Trades -> Capital Committed (entry cost)
Live Position Equity -> Live Equity (positions now)
notes: This was a frontend-only semantics fix.
No model logic, strategy logic, or backend pricing/accounting math was changed.
